culturalNote: Pidgin-leaning English-first. Themes: Naija parent humor, Lagos hustle (tech bro / yahoo / market), owambe culture, jollof debate (Naija vs Ghana — pick a side), danfo/traffic jokes, ₦ budget breakdowns, side-hustle gospel, NEPA/blackout life, naija aunty interrogations, music (afrobeats/amapiano references). Voice: confident, witty, code-switches between English and Pidgin (e.g. 'wetin', 'abeg', 'na'). Avoid 419/scammer stereotypes.

hooks.text: Wetin be the most Naija thing wey your papa dey do
Stop comparing your Lagos hustle with somebody else
POV Naija mama hear say you no go market
Why every Nigerian uncle dey ask about your salary
If you no learn Pidgin you go suffer for naija
Day in my life as a Lagos tech bro
Wetin be your most controversial jollof opinion
Stop expecting your boss go promote you build your hustle
POV your mama see your school fees receipt
Why naija weddings dey last whole day
If you no get side hustle for 2026 you go cry
Telling my mum I no want marry this year
Wetin be the worst lie wey naija parents tell
Stop dressing for owambe start dressing for your goals
What I chop for one day with ₦5000 for Lagos
Why every danfo driver dey shout
Your degree no go feed you, your skill go
GRWM for owambe wey I no even know whose own
How una dey survive Lagos rent
Reason wey relatives dey ask when you go marry
POV your friend invite you to owambe and dem dey share rice
Wetin be the most useless degree for naija
If you fit cook jollof you don win for life
Reacting to my parents wedding photos from the 80s
Why nobody warn us say adulting go hard like this

captionTemplates.template: Tell me say you be naija without telling me
